items.name_en: 【Old Pink Tiger ❤ Large】
items.name_cn:
【Old Pink Tiger ❤ Large】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship product reflecting Dior's aesthetic. It holds various daily essentials and features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery, offering a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully demonstrating Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 42×35×18.5cm

items.name_cn:
【Original Leather】
A new minimalist bucket bag featuring imported lambskin drawstrings and a signature logo. Large capacity design combining style and practicality. Very spacious. The smooth lambskin texture feels premium. Includes a detachable pouch. Adjustable shoulder strap allows you to switch between a shoulder bag and a crossbody bag. Perfect for various daily occasions. Full of dimensionality. Perfectly interprets understated minimalism~
Model: 804302
Size: 24×30×12cm

items.name_en: 【Overseas Exclusive】M12099 Black, Small. 🔥 Double-sided. This legendary Neverfull BB handbag always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home or travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a stylish city tote. Loosen the drawstrings to revert to a chic and practical handbag. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. The version shown is made of Damier Azur canvas.
